procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1036.005
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1036.005 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

runs.stdout:
PathToAtomicsFolder = /opt/atomic-red-team/atomics

Executing test: T1036.005-1 Execute a process from a directory masquerading as the current parent directory
Hello from the Atomic Red Team test T1036.005#1
Exit code: 0
Done executing test: T1036.005-1 Execute a process from a directory masquerading as the current parent directory

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1036.005 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1036.005'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1036.005 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1

sigma.title: Creation Of Pod In System Namespace
Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation via Masqueraded XML File
Scheduled Task Creation Masquerading as System Processes
Flash Player Update from Suspicious Location
Files With System DLL Name In Unsuspected Locations
Files With System Process Name In Unsuspected Locations
Suspicious Files in Default GPO Folder

osquery.name: t1036_005_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1036_005_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 10 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
promotion.sigma_direct_note: Real Sigma firing confirmed in sigma_evaluation_report.json (Linux osquery or Windows Sysmon GHA telemetry). Cert tier upgraded to direct (-D).

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
